page_metadata.biotools__summary: A procedure that uses target-decoy competition (or knockoffs) to reject multiple hypotheses in the presence of group structure. The procedure controls the false discovery rate (FDR) at a user-specified threshold.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A procedure that uses target-decoy competition (or knockoffs) to reject multiple hypotheses in the presence of group structure. The procedure controls the false discovery rate (FDR) at a user-specified threshold.
